Name: Versari Korad
Flavor: The continent's oldest knowledge empire. They don't conquer — they embed
column7: until the debt is too deep to refuse.

Name: Goldgrass Coalition
Flavor: Grain-belt city-states bound by mutual need and mutual suspicion. They feed the continent and are tired of being grateful for the privilege.

Name: Grand Lakers
Flavor: Industrial and maritime power rising from the wreckage of the great lakes. Their ships and their scholars are both catching up faster than anyone expected.

Name: Free Plainers
column6: no master. They move where the wind and the Scrap take them
column7: and they've learned that the ungoverned spaces belong to whoever arrives first.
